/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror CMakeFiles/runUnitTests.dir/Test/Test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runUnitTests.dir/Test/Test_Meeting.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runUnitTests.dir/Test/Test_MeetingPlanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runUnitTests.dir/Test/Test_Participation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runUnitTests.dir/Test/Test_XMLreader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runUnitTests.dir/Test/Test_Renovation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runUnitTests.dir/Test/Building/Test_Building.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runUnitTests.dir/Test/Campus/Test_Campus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runUnitTests.dir/Meeting.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runUnitTests.dir/Participation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runUnitTests.dir/Room.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runUnitTests.dir/MeetingPlanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runUnitTests.dir/XMLreader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runUnitTests.dir/Campus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runUnitTests.dir/Building.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runUnitTests.dir/Renovation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runUnitTests.dir/tinyxml_2_6_2/tinyxml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runUnitTests.dir/tinyxml_2_6_2/tinyxmlparser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runUnitTests.dir/tinyxml_2_6_2/tinyxmlerror.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runUnitTests.dir/tinyxml_2_6_2/tinystr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runUnitTests.dir/Catering.cpp.o -o runUnitTests  lib/libgtest.a lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgtest.a
